verse_text: 'If you love Me, keep a My commandments.

pericope.title: The Coming of the Holy Spirit

links.context: This summary of the organic relationship of faith and works (see [[MAT.7:21]]; 25:31-46; [[JOH.14:15]]; [[GAL.5:6]]) shows that only God can save.

Ben Sirach declares that he who keeps the law does the equivalent to making a peace offering. Faithfulness to God's revelation requires obedience. Jesus said, "If you love Me, keep My commandments" ([[JOH.14:15]]).
